name: NATURAL GAS SERVICES GROUP INC
business: Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. rents, designs, installs, services, and maintains natural gas and electric compression equipment and related assets to the oil and gas industry, focusing on large and medium horsepower applications for artificial lift and production enhancement. Its primary customers are exploration and production companies, with 78% of rental revenue generated from the Permian Basin.
sellsTo: oil and gas exploration and production companies

exposures.sentence: We rent, design, install, service and maintain natural gas and electric compressors and related equipment for oil and gas production and processing facilities, generally using equipment from third-party fabricators and OEM suppliers.

catalysts.event: Fleet expansion of approximately 11% to approximately 663,000 horsepower, primarily from addition of 70 new large compressor units.
catalysts.sentence: Throughout 2025, we expanded our fleet horsepower by approximately 11 percent to approximately 663,000 horsepower primarily from the addition of 70 new large (over 400 horsepower) compressor units.

catalysts.event: Initiated a common stock dividend of $0.10 per share in Q3 2025, increased to $0.11 per share for Q4 2025 and Q1 2026.
catalysts.sentence: We initiated a common stock dividend during the third quarter of 2025 for $0.10 per share and increased it to $0.11 per share for the fourth quarter of 2025 and first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Amendment to senior secured revolving credit agreement to increase total commitment to $400.0 million with an accordion feature of $100.0 million.
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we secured an amendment to our senior secured revolving credit agreement, as amended (the Credit Facility ) to (i) increase our total commitment to $400.0 million, (ii) expand the accordion feature to $100.0 million, (iii) reduce interest rates at comparable leverage levels and (iv) provide for a more flexible leverage covenant.

catalysts.event: Initiated efforts to market non-essential real estate properties, including the Midland Facility in Q2 2025 and the Former Headquarters Property in February 2026.
catalysts.sentence: We initiated efforts to market certain non-essential real estate properties including our former assembly facility in Midland, Texas (the Midland Facility ) in the second quarter of 2025 and our former corporate headquarters facility, also in Midland, Texas (the Former Headquarters Property ), in February 2026.

catalysts.event: Received over $12 million in federal income tax refunds and interest in January 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we received over $12 million, including interest, representing a substantial portion of federal income tax refunds that were due to us since 2020.
